comments: PageGuard is a free website health scanner that checks accessibility (WCAG 2.1 Level A/AA), SEO, performance, and best practices in under 30 seconds. It provides an overall health score with a dedicated accessibility score, identifies specific issues with remediation guidance, and offers automated monitoring with email alerts for score changes.
features: PageGuard performs automated WCAG 2.1 accessibility checks on websites, returning a 0-100 accessibility score alongside issue details and remediation suggestions. Users can scan any public URL for free without registration. Paid plans (from $9/month) enable automated monitoring of multiple websites with scheduled re-scans and score-change email alerts—particularly valuable for organizations managing ADA Title II compliance before the April 2026 deadline.
title: PageGuard
